testcase.name: Create Service Request (v2) › TC-01: Login as Admin
testcase.error:
projects/dep/test-plans/service-requests/create-service-request-v2.spec.ts:19:7 › Create Service Request (v2) › TC-01: Login as Admin
Test timeout of 90000ms exceeded.
Error: expect(page).not.toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected pattern: not /login/i Received string: "https://linux-dep-adminportal-test.azurewebsites.net/login"
Call log: - Expect "not toHaveURL" with timeout 5000ms 5 × unexpected value "https://linux-dep-adminportal-test.azurewebsites.net/login"
37 | 38 | // ASSERT (BLOCKING) dashboard or home page is visible after login > 39 | await expect(page).not.toHaveURL(/login/i); | ^ 40 | await expect(page.getByRole('menuitem', { name: /Cases/i }).first()).toBeVisible(); 41 | }); 42 | at /home/runner/work/Test-ReportsHub/Test-ReportsHub/projects/dep/test-plans/service-requests/create-service-request-v2.spec.ts:39:28
